name: Justicar's Mark
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that allows you to apply the Justicar's Mark status effect on one of your allies. While this effect is active, the marked target gains 20% damage redirection, as 20% of the damage they would have taken is redirected to you instead. Additionally, you take 20% more damage.
desc: Mark someone you wish to protect for a minute. While marked, you take 20% of the damage they receive but they take 20% less damage. Marking someone also cause you to take 20% more damage while they are marked.
